global_summary: Portfolio is behind pace: 29 of 174 tasks closed, roughly a third of the month's work-days logged. Ginger Brown and Clifford Clack carry the steepest slips and need weekend recovery. Felton, Martha, and Rohini sit closest to plan.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Only the fireplace and doors brick fix is done; 1 of 21 expected work-days complete, Slip: 95%. Next: install appliances by Sun Jul 12.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Secret door built; 4 of 13 expected work-days done, Slip: 64%. Next: painting additional and final cleaning by Sun Jul 12.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Slip: 12% of the month plan (15.0 of 23.0 expected work-days done; 3/29 tasks). To recover: finish KITCHEN : PLUMBING TRIM by Sat Jul 11.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Foundation dug and in-ground plumbing done; 11 of 16 expected work-days complete, Slip: 15%. Next: in-ground electrical by Sun Jul 12.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: No tasks closed this week; 10 of 22 expected work-days done, Slip: 25%. Next: primer first coat and tiles by Sun Jul 12.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Seven of eight weekly tasks closed; 28 of 38 expected work-days done, Slip: 19%. Next: cabinet paint by Sun Jul 12.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Stairs framed; 55 of 71 expected work-days done, Slip: 16%. Next: plumbing and mechanical rough-in by Sun Jul 12.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Exterior sheathing framed; 13 of 16 expected work-days done, Slip: 5%. Next: roof decking by Sun Jul 12.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: All three weekly tasks closed, sheetrock hung; 10 of 12 expected work-days done, Slip: 5%. Next: tape, bed and texture by Thu Jul 16.
